text: The road to discovery of NFkB is described by David Baltimore (Baltimore 2009). Later it became clear that the main event of NFkB activation was IkB phosphorylation. In order the phosphorylate IkB, a kinase was necessary. This turned out to be the IkB kinase, or IKK complex (DiDonato et al. 1997; Karin 1999). Now, it has been well established that IKK complex can activate the NFkB pathway and inhibition leads to NFkB inhibition. This is described in the following reviews:  (Liu et al. 2017)  (Gamble et al. 2012)  (Karin et al. 2004)  (Perkins 2007)  (Li & Verma 2002)  (Ghosh & Hayden 2008)  (Hayden & Ghosh 2012)  (Gupta et al. 2010)
